title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hey. Don't you think you've won enough
already?
choice_data_list: You wanted me to give it my best.
You wanted me to give it my best.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, well there's no questioning your skills. So
that's how you judge timing, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway, what are we going to do with all these?
Maybe we can give them to the student council?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But then I'd have to carry them over there and
walk into the student council office with an armful
of plushies...
choice_data_list: I think they'll be all smiles.
I think they'll be all smiles.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You think this is funny, don't you?
